name: Kirill Meretskov
longDesc: Kirill Meretskov est un général infanterie de qualité argent — URSS. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Strategic Attack
skills.desc: After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 60% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

skills.name: Infantry Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Guerrilla
skills.desc: 36% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Kirill Meretskov is a silver-quality infantry general — USSR. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Kirill Meretskov ist ein Silber-Infanterie-General — UdSSR. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
